description: إصلاح أنماط regex في السطور 189 و191 باستخدام hex escapes بدلاً من علامات التنصيص المباشرة
command_preview: $file = 'C:\Users\Revexn\CodeAnalyzer\code_analyzer.py'; $lines = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllLines($file, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8); Write-Output "Before:"; Write-Output "L189: $($lines[188])"; Write-Output "L191: $($lines[190])"; $lines[188] = '            if re.search(r"password\s*=\s*[\x27\x22][^\x27\x22]+[\x27\x22]", stripped, re.IGNORECASE):'; $lines[190] = '            if re.search(r"(api_key|secret|token)\s*=\s*[\x27\x22][^\x27\x22]{8,}[\x27\x22]", stripped, re.IGNORECASE):'; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllLines($file, $lines, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8); Write-Output "After:"; Write-Output "L189: $($lines[188])"; Write-Output "L191: $($lines[190])"; Write-Output "Done!"
output:
Before:
L189:             if re.search(r"password\s*=\s*['"][^'"]+['"]" , stripped, re.IGNORECASE):
L191:             if re.search(r"(api_key|secret|token)\s*=\s*['"][^'"]{8,}['"]" , stripped, re.IGNORECASE):
After:
L189:             if re.search(r"password\s*=\s*[\x27\x22][^\x27\x22]+[\x27\x22]", stripped, re.IGNORECASE):
L191:             if re.search(r"(api_key|secret|token)\s*=\s*[\x27\x22][^\x27\x22]{8,}[\x27\x22]", stripped, re.IGNORECASE):
Done!
